title: F3 Nope
description: Replace the F3 menu with text of your choice in a lightweight and configurable way.
body:
F3Nope is a lightweight Fabric mod that lets you completely customize — or remove — the Minecraft debug overlay.
  
- Hide Vanilla Debug Info – Strip away all default F3 information
- Custom Text Display – Show your own text instead of debug data
- Fully Configurable – Toggle features and edit text via commands or config
- Placeholder System - Add Variable that autofill time, date, version and more
- Live Editing – Change settings in-game without restarting

You can configure everything with a config file or by using in-game commands, below are a few examples.

```
/f3nope text add hello world
/f3nope text add "MC %mc_version% | FPS: %fps%"
/f3nope toggle hideVanillaDebug true
/f3nope position 100 100
/f3nope color 0a36b2
```
